text: I feel a quiet sense of transition, caught between the sleek, almost clinical confines of a contemporary meeting space and the vibrant, playful presentation of innovation and research. The end of a video signifies a pause, an echo of closure, yet here amid glass reflections and bold colored walls, I sense the persistence of thought—the invitation to reflect, to question, and to anticipate new dialogues. There is both an ending and a beginning here; I feel expectant, curious, and ever aware of the movement of time and ideas.
